owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

recordFailure(address).notice: Record a failure for a node. Increments consecutive failures.         Callable by ICL (authorized slasher).

resetFailures(address).notice: Reset consecutive failures (e.g., after successful job).

slash(address,uint256,string).notice: Slash a node's stake. Callable by authorized slashers.         Resets consecutive failures after slash.

stake(uint256).notice: Stake BLIND tokens. Must approve this contract first.

documentation.text: @notice Stake BLIND tokens. Must approve this contract first.

@notice Slash a node's stake. Callable by authorized slashers.
         Resets consecutive failures after slash.

         Callable by ICL (authorized slasher).
@notice Reset consecutive failures (e.g., after successful job).
